title: Sirius XM And iHeart Media In Talks To Merge
description: SiriusXM and iHeart Media are in preliminary talks to merge. A consolidation of the two giants would bring further dominance in radio, and a greater share of the fast-growing podcast market.
content: Howard Stern is still a big audience draw for SiriusXM. In December 2025, he announced a contract extension to continue The Howard Stern Show for three more years, featuring a flexible schedule on hi… [+6337 chars]

author: Emma Burleigh
title: Apple’s Steve Jobs told students to never ‘settle’ in their careers: ‘If you haven’t found it yet, keep looking’
description: The late Steve Jobs spent decades scaling Apple into the $4 trillion tech behemoth it is today. Even during turbulent times, he said, “the only thing that kept me going was that I loved what I did.”
